problem id: 2441e2b4
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(7) XOR SHR(5)

examples:
  00111100 -> 00000001
  10101100 -> 00000101
  11100000 -> 00000111
  01011011 -> 10000010
  01111010 -> 00000011
  11100010 -> 00000111
  10001110 -> 00000100
  10010101 -> 10000100
  10100100 -> 00000101
  01111101 -> 10000011

query: 10111110
predicted answer: 00000101
